# Macro CPI Baseline Report — 2026-05-28

## Target
- Series: `CPIAUCSL`
- Transform: `mom_pct`
- Horizon: 1 month(s)

## Verdict
Best model **lgbm** beats the naive last-value benchmark.

## Summary metrics (out-of-sample, walk-forward)
| model | RMSE | MAE | dir. acc. | naive RMSE | skill vs naive | beats naive |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ridge | 0.4661 | 0.2853 | 74.12% | 0.3089 | -50.87% | False |
| lgbm | 0.2939 | 0.2034 | 81.79% | 0.3089 | 4.86% | True |
| naive | 0.3089 | 0.2196 | 77.96% | 0.3089 | 0.00% | False |

## Data coverage
- Forecast rows: 433
- Walk-forward folds: 313
- Span: 1990-02-01 .. 2026-04-01

## Features (81)
`CPIAUCSL__level`, `CPIAUCSL__mom`, `CPIAUCSL__yoy`, `CPIAUCSL__z12`, `CPIAUCSL__z24`, `CPILFESL__level`, `CPILFESL__mom`, `CPILFESL__yoy`, `CPILFESL__z12`, `CPILFESL__z24`, `PCEPI__level`, `PCEPI__mom`, `PCEPI__yoy`, `PCEPI__z12`, `PCEPI__z24`, `PAYEMS__level`, `PAYEMS__mom`, `PAYEMS__yoy`, `PAYEMS__z12`, `PAYEMS__z24`, `UNRATE__level`, `UNRATE__mom`, `UNRATE__yoy`, `UNRATE__z12`, `UNRATE__z24`, `INDPRO__level`, `INDPRO__mom`, `INDPRO__yoy`, `INDPRO__z12`, `INDPRO__z24`, `FEDFUNDS__level`, `FEDFUNDS__mom`, `FEDFUNDS__yoy`, `FEDFUNDS__z12`, `FEDFUNDS__z24`, `DGS2__level`, `DGS2__mom`, `DGS2__yoy`, `DGS2__z12`, `DGS2__z24`, `DGS10__level`, `DGS10__mom`, `DGS10__yoy`, `DGS10__z12`, `DGS10__z24`, `DX-Y.NYB__level`, `DX-Y.NYB__mom`, `DX-Y.NYB__yoy`, `DX-Y.NYB__z12`, `DX-Y.NYB__z24`, `RSAFS__level`, `RSAFS__mom`, `RSAFS__yoy`, `RSAFS__z12`, `RSAFS__z24`, `SPY__level`, `SPY__mom`, `SPY__yoy`, `SPY__z12`, `SPY__z24`, `CL=F__level`, `CL=F__mom`, `CL=F__yoy`, `CL=F__z12`, `CL=F__z24`, `GC=F__level`, `GC=F__mom`, `GC=F__yoy`, `GC=F__z12`, `GC=F__z24`, `TREAS_AVG_RATE_MARKETABLE__level`, `TREAS_AVG_RATE_MARKETABLE__mom`, `TREAS_AVG_RATE_MARKETABLE__yoy`, `TREAS_AVG_RATE_MARKETABLE__z12`, `TREAS_AVG_RATE_MARKETABLE__z24`, `slope_10y_2y`, `real_fed_funds_proxy`, `target_lag1`, `target_lag2`, `target_lag3`, `target_lag12`

## Model parameters
- Ridge alpha: 1.0
- LightGBM: {'n_estimators': 300, 'learning_rate': 0.03, 'num_leaves': 15, 'min_child_samples': 10, 'subsample': 0.8, 'colsample_bytree': 0.8, 'random_state': 42, 'verbosity': -1}
- Min train months before first OOS fold: 120
- Validation: expanding-window walk-forward, one-step-ahead, no k-fold

## Point-in-time methodology
Features are assembled by as-of join on each series' `release_date`; a value is never used
before its publication. Release dates are stamped via the per-series publication-lag table in
`config.py`. Architecture is ALFRED-vintage-ready (realtime params) for a later upgrade.
